title: Organization Repurposes Firearms into Art and Tools
summary: An organization is transforming unwanted firearms into garden tools, art, and jewelry, giving them a new purpose.
charlotte_impact: Repurposing firearms reduces waste and promotes creative solutions for handling unwanted weapons.

title: Serene Sunday Precedes Impending Wet Weather
summary: A comfortable Sunday with highs in the 70s is expected before rain and potential storms arrive on Monday.
charlotte_impact: Residents should enjoy the pleasant weather while preparing for potential heavy rain and storms.

title: Charlotte Mayoral Applications: Council Weighs Options
summary: Charlotte City Council is considering factors as applications for the next mayoral race open, including candidate intentions for 2027.
charlotte_impact: The selection process will shape the future leadership and direction of Charlotte.

title: Shelby Officer Fired; SBI Investigates Use of Force
summary: A Shelby police officer was fired, and the NC SBI is investigating a use-of-force incident at the request of local authorities.
charlotte_impact: The investigation highlights accountability and transparency in law enforcement practices.

title: Shooting Incident Reported in Northeast Charlotte
summary: One person was shot on Graypark Drive near Orr Street in northeast Charlotte, prompting an investigation.
charlotte_impact: The shooting raises concerns about public safety and the prevalence of gun violence in the area.

title: Widespread Flooding Strands Cars, Closes Restaurants in Union County
summary: Severe flooding in Union County has led to stranded vehicles, restaurant closures, and disruption of local activities.
charlotte_impact: Flooding highlights the vulnerability of infrastructure and the need for better flood management.

title: Fan Reflects on Meeting NASCAR Legend Kyle Busch
summary: A Kyle Busch superfan shares memories of her unexpected final meeting with the NASCAR legend before his passing.
charlotte_impact: Personal anecdotes provide a glimpse into the impact of a beloved figure on his fans.

title: Wrongful Death Lawsuit Filed in Fatal Plane Crash
summary: Greg Biffle's ex-wife files a wrongful death lawsuit alleging negligence in a plane crash that killed seven people.
charlotte_impact: The lawsuit seeks accountability for the tragic plane crash and raises questions about safety standards.

title: Technical Issues Disrupt CMS End-of-Year Testing
summary: Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools face technical problems during end-of-year testing, causing stress and concern among students and parents.
charlotte_impact: Technical glitches can disrupt education and increase anxiety for students during crucial assessments.

title: Couple Wins $1.6M Judgment Over Construction Woes
summary: A Denver couple wins a $1.6 million judgment against Nest Homes for breach of contract and fraudulent misrepresentation.
charlotte_impact: The case highlights the risks of construction disputes and the importance of consumer protection.

title: Shelby Officer Suspended for Punching Woman During Arrest
summary: A Shelby police officer has been suspended for punching a woman during an arrest, sparking outrage and an internal investigation.
charlotte_impact: The incident raises serious questions about police conduct and the use of force.

title: Thieves Target Clover Neighborhood in Car Break-in Spree
summary: Thieves targeted the Clover neighborhood for the second time, breaking into multiple vehicles and stealing at least one gun.
charlotte_impact: The repeated break-ins raise concerns about community safety and the need for increased security.

title: Salisbury Teacher Arrested on Sex Offense Charges
summary: A Salisbury teacher turned himself in on multiple sex offense charges involving a former student, dating back to 2012.
charlotte_impact: The arrest underscores the severity of sexual misconduct allegations and the long-term impact on victims.

title: Charlotte Douglas Receives $46.9M for Apron Expansion
summary: The FAA awarded Charlotte Douglas International Airport $46.9 million to expand its airport apron, improving infrastructure.
charlotte_impact: The expansion will enhance airport capacity and efficiency, benefiting travelers and the local economy.

title: Man Dies Months After Hit-and-Run in Charlotte
summary: A man died 10 months after a hit-and-run incident in north Charlotte. Police are seeking information on the driver.
charlotte_impact: The death highlights the tragic consequences of hit-and-run incidents and the need for justice.
